allow: Bash(# Compare the 3 copies structurally - extract just the first 80 chars of each line # Copy 1: lines 1-392, Copy 2: lines 393-784, Copy 3: lines 785-1178 # Check if copies are identical by comparing sed -n ''1,390p'' ""c:/Users/klime/OneDrive/Plocha/narozk/info.html"" sed -n ''393,782p'' ""c:/Users/klime/OneDrive/Plocha/narozk/info.html"" sed -n ''785,1176p'' ""c:/Users/klime/OneDrive/Plocha/narozk/info.html"" echo ""=== Line counts ==="" wc -l /tmp/copy1.txt /tmp/copy2.txt /tmp/copy3.txt echo ""=== Diff copy1 vs copy2 ==="" diff /tmp/copy1.txt /tmp/copy2.txt)
